description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle featuring a long, dark brown handguard with a full-length Picatinny rail on top for mounting accessories. The receiver and stock are matte black, with the stock exhibiting a skeletonized design for reduced weight and a contemporary appearance. The magazine is detachable and colored tan, contrasting with the rest of the rifle. Flip-up iron sights are mounted at the front and rear of the rail, providing basic aiming capability. The barrel is standard length and ends with a flash hider, which is a common muzzle device for reducing visible muzzle flash. The overall design suggests a lightweight, modular firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a skeletonized black stock, brown handguard, tan detachable magazine, and flip-up iron sights. The barrel is fitted with a flash hider.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel, front sight, and flash hider.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the brown handguard, black skeletonized stock, and tan magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the stock and the alignment of the sights along the top rail.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with clear visibility of the handguard, stock, and magazine.
